rows.name: question_4
rows.value: Which of the parents attended your online support group session?

rows.name: no_parent_added_text
rows.value: No parents added yet. You need to add parents to your group before you can submit this report.

rows.name: question_1
rows.value: How many minutes did you spend facilitating your parent online support group over the last week?

rows.name: question_3
rows.value: How do you feel the session went?
